description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow should have three jobs: build, formatting, and build-docs. The build job should run on a matrix of ubuntu-latest and windows-latest, setting up Python 3.6, installing dependencies, and running tests with pytest and codecov. The formatting job should run on ubuntu-latest and check the code format using pre-commit. The build-docs job should run on ubuntu-latest, setting up Python 3.6, installing dependencies, and building the documentation.
